text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is weighed down with fatigue, so I
decide to take her to the infirmary and let her
rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for taking care of me! I was feeling really
tired.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me, I think I'll go lie down
for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?
Hey... Listen to our voice... Can ya hear us?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Who's talking?
Over here... Yeah, Mejiro Ryan, right here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: N-no way... The voice is coming from...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Inside me? Wait... It's my muscles?!

text_block_list.name: Ryan's Muscles
text_block_list.text:
You got that right. We're your strong,
well-defined muscles—everything that's keepin'
your body together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Are you... for real?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you so much for everything! Ever
since I was little, I've wanted to say this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for growing strong with me! You're,
like, my number one partner!

text_block_list.name: Ryan's Muscles
text_block_list.text:
You got it, Ryan. Yeah... Don't ever let up on
rockin' the weights and grabbin' those sweet
gains!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I'll show you just how strong we can get!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We'll keep working out... together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Wh-where am I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, it's nothing... I just had a strange dream, I
think.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I talked to them... To my muscles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I understand what she means... but it
seems like Mejiro Ryan's condition is improving.

text_block_list.name: Ryan's Muscles
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ryan... But we gotta tell ya...

text_block_list.name: Ryan's Muscles
text_block_list.text:
Forget pumpin' all that heavy iron... Imagine
this—eatin' a huge tray of tasty treats... then
sleepin' in alllll day... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what'd you just say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I never knew my muscles felt this way... Is that
what you really want?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: W-wait, muscles! Don't gooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gasp!
choice_data_list: You were tossing and turning... What's wrong?
You were tossing and turning... What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It feels like I had a bad dream... but I can't
remember any of it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like Mejiro Ryan didn't rest well.
